callGraph.callee:
loaded.admin
    .from('restaurant_tables')
    .update({ deleted_at: new Date().toISOString() })
    .eq('id', tableId)
    .eq('restaurant_id', loaded.restaurant.id)
    .is
lineItems.map(item => ` ${item.emoji} ${item.name_pt} ${formatOrderListItemPrintQty(item, buffetGuestLabels)} €${(item.price * item.qty).toFixed(2)} `).join

params:
{

  initialOrders = [],
  initialActiveTableIds = [],
  isDemo = false,
  handleSignOut,
  exitLabel,
  confirmBeforeSignOut,
}

callGraph.callee:
supabase
        .from('orders')
        .update({ items: nextItems, status: nextOrderStatus })
        .eq('id', order.id)
        .eq
